creator: kreinholz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 255421
Patch updating emulators/ppsspp to 1.18.1 with bundled multimedia/ffmpeg3 as static build dep

Now that multimedia/ffmpeg3 is committed to the Ports tree, smaller proposed patch updating ppsspp from 1.17.1_1 to 1.18.1, using static multimedia/ffmpeg3 libs as a build dep.
